visual_description: A group of people, mostly men in business attire, are gathered in what appears to be an office or command center, with some seated at desks and others standing. One man in a suit stands at the front, gesturing toward a whiteboard covered with diagrams and notes, while others face him attentively. Several individuals are visible in the foreground and background, some looking toward the speaker, others focused on screens or documents.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in Mandarin.
